title: Peruvian Beef Brochette with Magical Spice
description: A flavorful and savory Peruvian-inspired dish featuring grilled beef brochette marinated in a blend of magical spices.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, whisk together Peruvian Magical Spice Blend, lime juice, olive oil, garlic, cumin, and salt.
2. Add the beef skewers to the marinade and mix well to coat.
3. Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
5. Remove beef skewers from marinade, letting any excess liquid drip off.
6. Grill the beef skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until cooked to desired doneness.
7. Transfer beef skewers to a plate and let rest for 5 minutes.
8. Serve hot, garnished with sliced red onion and additional Peruvian Magical Spice Blend if desired.
